title: HealthTier
description: Output of computeHealthTier() in src/report-shared.js. Classifies a repository into a health tier and provides a list of individual checks with pass/fail status. The function consumes a RepoDetails object (from PortfolioDetails) merged with the PortfolioRepo entry.

tier.description: Computed health tier. gold requires all gold and silver checks to pass; silver requires all silver checks; bronze requires at least one bronze check; none otherwise.

checks.description: Evaluated health checks in the order computeHealthTier() defines them

passed.description: Whether this check passed for the evaluated repository

required_for.description: The minimum tier this check must pass to achieve. A check required_for 'gold' must pass for both gold tier (directly) and is implicitly evaluated for silver as well when gold is attempted.
